# 2024.07.27武汉场（WIP）{#wuhan-20240727}


```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.cap='2024周深9.29Hz巡回演唱会2024.07.27武汉场歌单', out.width = "400px"}
knitr::include_graphics(rep("img/playlists/playlists-wuhan-20240727.png"))
```


***

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.cap='周深武汉体育中心主体育场演唱会结束微博 【@weibo-charlie】'}
knitr::include_graphics(rep("img/weibo/wuhan-20240727.png"))
```
